steps.prompt: Let's explore shapes! Can you make your object a CIRCLE? Circles are perfectly round.
steps.feedback: A circle — perfectly round, no corners anywhere!

steps.prompt: Now try a SQUARE — four equal sides, four corners.
steps.feedback: A square! Four sides, all the same length. Count the corners — one, two, three, four!

steps.prompt: Now a TRIANGLE — three sides and three corners.
steps.feedback: A triangle! Three sides and three corners. One, two, three!

steps.prompt: Now pick YOUR favourite shape — circle, square, or triangle!
steps.feedback: Good choosing! You know your shapes.
